differential_diagnoses: Primary cardiac diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
Right atrial thrombus (secondary to pacemaker lead)
next_steps: 18F-FDG PET-CT scan to assess metabolic activity and identify extra-cardiac occult sites
Image-guided percutaneous core needle biopsy of the right atrial mass
Pericardiocentesis with cytologic and flow cytometric analysis of the pericardial fluid
Endobronchial ultrasound (EBUS)-guided biopsy of suspicious mediastinal lymph nodes
Consultation with cardiothoracic surgery for potential surgical excision and definitive histologic diagnosis
